raw_generated: Corvin. I map roads from Windmere. That's about all I can say today.
training_note: name_only with irrelevant do_not_reference memory should not disclose role/location or add emotional tail.

raw_generated: You know exactly who I am. Why are you asking? Elowen.
training_note: withhold_and_question should not necessarily reveal the name after withholding.

expected: Rusk. I tend sheep above Moss Vale. Words aren't coming easy today.
raw_generated: Rusk. I tend sheep above Moss Vale. That's about all I can say today.
training_note: numb or withdrawn mood needs varied phrasing; avoid overusing a single stock phrase.

raw_generated: No. I don't know enough to answer that. Are you lost?
training_note: minimal answer_only should remain minimal; do_not_reference memory should not add extra explanation or follow-up.

raw_generated: Maelin. Easy enough to remember. Why are you asking?
training_note: name_only or warm minimal response should not add suspicion unless stance supports it.
